scripts.build: pnpm --filter @myfinance/domain build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/analytics build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/classification build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/market-data build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/db build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/web build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/cli build && pnpm --filter @myfinance/worker build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @myfinance/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/analytics typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/classification typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/market-data typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/db typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @myfinance/worker typecheck
